original_abstract: This paper examines ChatGPT, a sophisticated natural language processing (NLP) framework developed by OpenAI, providing a comprehensive overview of its core features, advantages, and inherent limitations. Through an analysis of its underlying architecture and diverse potential applications, this study explores the system’s capacity to facilitate seamless human-machine interaction. While the findings characterize ChatGPT as a transformative tool capable of generating remarkably coherent and context-aware dialogue, the paper also identifies significant technical and ethical challenges that must be navigated as the technology evolves. Finally, we conclude that while ChatGPT represents a major milestone in NLP, its long-term utility depends on addressing these critical constraints.
humanized_abstract: ChatGPT is a state-of-the-art natural language processing (NLP) framework provided by OpenAI. In this paper, we give a full view of its properties, strength and shortcomings. By analyzing the structure of ChatGPT and its possible usage, we assess the communicative effectiveness of ChatGPT and its potential to change the way people communicate with machines and with other humans. Our experiments show that ChatGPT is a highly effective communication device that supports truly natural conversation the chatbot’s responses are highly relevant, coherent and context aware. On the other hand, there are several challenges that ChatGPT needs to overcome before it can be adopted in real applications. In conclusion, ChatGPT is an important breakthrough in NLP technology, and its effects cannot be fully understood without taking into account the inevitable limitations that need to be addressed.
